channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: SpecBuddy - Mon Jul 13 21:30:01 UTC 2026
item.description:
Control over your AI coding agent — from the plan to every executed step. SpecBuddy turns AI-assisted development into a structured, reviewable process. Instead of...

item.title: Finance 7x24 News - Tue Jul 14 03:52:04 UTC 2026
item.description:
